institutionType: Non-Banking Financial Institution (NBFI)  - (Inlcuding leasing companies and factoring companies)
useCaseText: Listed, Rated, Senior, Unsecured, Redeemable Debenture — Fixed Rate option for investors seeking fixed income from a CSE-listed NBFI.
description: An initial Issue of Ten Million (10,000,000) Listed, Rated, Senior, Unsecured, Redeemable Debentures with an option to Issue further Five Million (5,000,000) of the said Debentures at the discretion of the Company in the event of an oversubscription of the initial Issue. The primary objective of the Debenture Issue is to accelerate the expansion of the Company's lending portfolio in alignment with its future growth strategy. Particular emphasis will be placed on financing two-wheelers, three-wheelers, and four-wheelers encompassing both electric and non-electric vehicles through leasing products, as well as strengthening the Company's gold loan segment. TYPE A: Fixed interest, 12.50% p.a. payable annually (AER 12.50%).
tenorText: 5 years
costText: Type A: 12.50% per annum, fixed, payable annually (Annual Effective Rate 12.50%). Issue Price: Sri Lanka Rupees One Hundred (LKR 100/-) per each Debenture. Par Value: LKR 100/-. Entity Rating: A-(lka) Stable by Fitch Ratings Lanka Limited. Issue Rating: A-(lka) by Fitch Ratings Lanka Limited. (Source: Prospectus p.7 'Issue at a Glance'; p.18 'Principal Features of the Debenture')
gracePeriod: Not disclosed (sources checked: Prospectus)
minFunding: LKR 10,000 (minimum subscription: 100 debentures at LKR 100 each; multiples of LKR 10,000)
maxFunding: LKR 1,500,000,000 (total issue size: up to 15 million debentures at LKR 100 each)
guarantee: None — senior unsecured debenture. Rights rank pari passu with claims of unsecured creditors of the Company.
eligibilityText: Any person identified as an Investor, who submits an Application Form under this Prospectus. Subscription list open at 9.30 a.m. on 24th April 2026 and closed at 4.30 p.m. on 14th May 2026. Non-Resident investors may be affected by the laws of the jurisdiction of their residence. This Prospectus has not been registered with any authority outside of Sri Lanka.
eligibleApplicants: Sri Lankan residents and non-resident investors (subject to local laws); corporates and institutions
valueChainText: Not disclosed (sources checked: Prospectus)
collateralText: Senior, Unsecured, Redeemable Debenture. Rights rank after secured creditors and preferential statutory claims, but pari passu with unsecured creditors.
requiredDocs: Application Form that constitutes part of this Prospectus. Valid identification document (for individuals). For corporates: relevant corporate authorization documents. Minimum subscription Rs 10,000 in multiples of Rs 10,000.
processingTime: Not disclosed — subscription period 24 April to 14 May 2026 (closed)
contactPerson: NDB Investment Bank Limited (Manager/Placement Agent); Ratnasamy Priyadharshini (Company Secretary)
smeApplicabilityText: OPEN: Open to general public investors including T&C corporate investors. T&C SMEs (as investors) may subscribe to earn fixed income on surplus funds. Subscription period appears closed as of current date (May 2026).

useCaseText: We can help you own the vehicle you've always dreamed of or need right now – whether it is a motorbike, three-wheeler, car, van, lorry, or any other four-wheeler…. at the ease of a monthly fee and with a few simple steps.

Pioneered three-wheeler leasing and gas-converted three-wheelers (10% CO2 and 30-40% other hazardous gas emission reduction). Flexible payment options: Equal, Step Up, Step Down, Balloon installment schedules. Maximum facility up to 70% depending on vehicle condition. 86+ customer points island-wide; facility arrangement within 5 working days.

maxFunding: Up to 70% of vehicle value (LTV)
guarantee: None disclosed

collateralText: Leased asset (vehicle) held as security via standard lease structure.

institutionType: Non-Banking Financial Institution (NBFI)  - (Inlcuding leasing companies and factoring companies)
useCaseText: Our Speed cash solution entitles you to obtain a temporary loan against your vehicle registration book. A flexible solution which allows the customer to fulfill a temporary need for capital and pay only the interest in installments for the period of the loan and the capital is paid only with the final installment […]. A customer who wishes to make a bulk payment during its tenor could also do so and reschedule his or loan.
description: Temporary loan against vehicle registration book. Pay only the interest in installments; capital paid with final installment. Bulk payment during tenor permitted (with rescheduling). No LTV applicable if it is your own vehicle. Loans against Deposits (Speed Cash Loan) per Key Facts Doc: 75–90% loan amount granted on approval; interest on daily reducing balance; hassle-free documentation; can be granted within 1 hour. Loan Rate = FD Rate + 4% (minimum at Management discretion).
tenorText: Not disclosed (sources checked: product page, KFD English Oct 2025)
costText: Loan Rate = FD Rate + 4%. Minimum rate at discretion of the Management. Documentation charges Rs.500 if loan amount is less than Rs.1Mn and Rs.1,000 if the loan amount is Rs.1Mn or above. All charges will vary from time to time at the discretion of the Management. (Source: AFC Key Facts Document English, Oct 2025, page 5)
maxFunding: 75–90% of FD value (Speed Cash against FD); No LTV cap if pledging own vehicle registration book
guarantee: Backed by vehicle registration book or FD pledge
eligibilityText: Must possess original vehicle registration book; Only available to Sri Lankan citizens; Vehicle ownership must be under applicant.
eligibleApplicants: Sri Lankan citizens owning a vehicle (registration book under applicant); OR FD holders for Speed Cash Loan against deposit.
collateralText: Original vehicle registration book held by AFC, or pledged Fixed Deposit.
requiredDocs: Original vehicle registration book; NIC. For Speed Cash against FD: Duly Endorsed original fixed deposit certificate; Speed Cash Loan Application form / Letter of Set-off / Loan Agreement; NIC / DL / PP.
processingTime: Within 1 hour of customer's arrival with proper documentation
smeApplicabilityText: OPEN: open to any vehicle owner / FD holder; usable as short-term working capital by T&C SME owners on personal-asset basis.

institutionType: Non-Banking Financial Institution (NBFI)  - (Inlcuding leasing companies and factoring companies)
productName: Social Entrepreneurship Program — Women Empowerment Loan
useCaseText: We are proud to announce a new milestone in our mission to foster inclusive finance! The Company has secured a USD 5 million senior loan from Triple Jump through the Global Gender Smart Fund (GGSF). This 3-year partnership marks a strategic step forward in our shared commitment to advancing gender equity, empowering women entrepreneurs, and promoting responsible and sustainable business practices in Sri Lanka. (Source: AFC press release Aug 2025)
description: AFC's Women Empowerment lending product under the Social Entrepreneurship Program, funded by USD 5 million senior loan from Triple Jump's Global Gender Smart Fund (3-year partnership, Aug 2025). Targets women entrepreneurs across Sri Lanka including women-led agri-MSMEs in dairy, cinnamon, pepper, cocoa, fruit and vegetable value chains via the DevPro MoU partnership (Sep 2025) which promotes climate-resilient market systems. Dedicated 'Women Empowerment Application' form is available on AFC's Downloads page.
productUrl: https://www.alliancefinance.lk/empowering-women-advancing-sri-lanka-company-secures-usd-5-million-from-triple-jumps-global-gender-smart-fund/ ; Downloads page lists 'Women Empowerment Application - English'

eligibilityText: Women entrepreneurs in Sri Lanka. DevPro priority: women-led agri-MSMEs in dairy, cinnamon, pepper, cocoa, fruit and vegetables value chains across five provinces; promoting climate-smart agriculture and innovative digital technologies (reservoir-based automated water management, blockchain-based index insurance platforms etc.).

institution: AMW Capital Leasing and Finance PLC
institutionType: Non-Banking Financial Institution (NBFI)  - (Inlcuding leasing companies and factoring companies)
useCaseText: When you need a brand-new or reconditioned vehicle or equipment, we are here to provide the best financial solution tailored to suit your requirements and repayment capacity. […] We finance all types of vehicles and equipment, for both personal and commercial use. What We Finance: Vehicles for personal use; Commercial vehicles; Equipment financing.
description: All you need to do is identify the asset and the supplier, and we will structure the most appropriate financial plan for you. Our comprehensive services include designing the ideal financing arrangement and handling all associated work on your behalf—saving you valuable time and effort. We finance all types of vehicles and equipment, for both personal and commercial use. Market Leadership: We are the market leader in financing Maruti Suzuki vehicles. Fast & Reliable Service — completion within 3–5 hours of receiving complete documents. (KFD: 'Leases are a financing option where AMWCL pays a part of the vehicle price so the customer can buy a vehicle. Then the customer makes fixed or structured payments over a period to pay off the amount financed by AMWCL with interest.')
tenorText: The lease/loan period can be from 4 months to 6 years. (KFD §5)
tenor: Long-term (> 5 years), Medium-term (1-5 years), Short-term (< 1 year)
costText: Interest: 'Interest is decided at the start of the lease/loan period. However, the agreed interest rates can be changed if a major economic problem threatens its stability, as agreed with customers, in which case the customer will be kept informed.' Fees & Charges (KFD p.5): 'At the start of the lease/loan: A one-time documentation fee for documents, visits, processing, etc. is charged. This will be between Rs.3,000 to Rs.25,000/- depending on the value of the facility.' 'During the facility period: If any customers' cheques are returned, Rs.2,500/- will be charged per cheque return. If the facility is not paid for over 3 months, we may visit the customer and charge Rs.1,250/- as visiting fee (only one visit charge will be added once a month, even if we visit multiple times).' 'At the closure of facility: Termination fee of between Rs.1,250/- and Rs.2,500/- (no termination fee charged during the last six months). If settling before the end of the period - pre-mature settlement fee of up to 30% from future capital. Rs.3,000/- for a duplicate of the deletion letter.' 'Applicable government taxes will be added to the facility amount (E.g. stamp duty).' 'Any amount that is due after the due date (delayed payments) will result in overdue interest of 3% per month (depending on market rates) on the due part.' Insurance: 'Insurance payment for vehicles is a legal requirement; this must be paid for the year at once. But during the first year, the insurance can be added to the installment as well.'
gracePeriod: Not disclosed (sources checked: product page, KFD)
minFunding: Not disclosed (sources checked: product page, Key Fact Document, downloads page)
maxFunding: Not disclosed (sources checked: product page, Key Fact Document, downloads page)
guarantee: None disclosed (vehicle / equipment is the leased asset)
eligibilityText: Customer must be between 20 to 70 years of age. Required documents and evidence listed in the next section must be brought. (KFD §5)
eligibleApplicants: Individuals (personal use); Businesses (commercial vehicles and equipment); Registered companies
businessSizeText: Not disclosed (sources checked: product page, KFD)
valueChainText: Not disclosed (sources checked: product page, KFD)
collateralText: The leased asset (vehicle / equipment) is owned by AMWCL during the lease; 'Ownership of the vehicle transferred to customer at the end if there are no dues.' (KFD §5). Pre-mature non-payment may lead to asset seizure: 'Non-payment for a long period may result in AMWCL taking legal action or presenting the facility to the mediation board. Assets may be seized as well.'
turnoverRequirement: Not disclosed (sources checked: product page, KFD)
capitalRequirement: Not disclosed (sources checked: product page, KFD)
greenCertRequirement: Not disclosed (sources checked: product page, KFD)

A recent (less than 3 months old) utility bill/s for either electricity, water or fixed line telephone bill in your name. […] Documents to prove source of funds for large deposits, or for large down payments for vehicles. Any other documents depending on the situation and as required by AMWCL (E.g. Gramasevaka certification if the name on NIC is unclear). Registered companies: The Certificate of Incorporation, Articles of Association, Board Resolution to open a deposit, copy of form 01, form 13, form 20, and form 40 (where applicable), Ultimate Beneficiary Owner details. Latest audited financial statements or management accounts if available. Plus: Individual and Joint Lease Loan HP Application; Business Lease Loan HP Application; Guarantor Statement (per downloads page).

institution: AMW Capital Leasing and Finance PLC
institutionType: Non-Banking Financial Institution (NBFI)  - (Inlcuding leasing companies and factoring companies)
useCaseText: Looking for a hassle-free way to manage your working capital or short-term financial needs without providing additional collateral? […] Our Auto Loan is designed to give you quick access to cash by pledging your vehicle, with repayments spread over a convenient period—reducing the burden on your future cash flows.
description: All you need is to pledge your vehicle with us and walk away with the cash for your requirement. Whether you are an existing client looking to refinance your asset or a new client in need of a fast and flexible financial solution, our Auto Loan is tailored to meet your needs with speed and value. Key Benefits: Quick cash availability within a few hours; Use your vehicle as collateral; No additional collateral required; Structured repayment spread over time; Reduces burden on future cash flows; Available for existing and new clients; Refinancing options for existing assets. Simple Process: 1. Pledge Your Vehicle — Use your vehicle as collateral—no additional security required. 2. Quick Approval — Get approved and receive your cash within just a few hours of submitting your application. 3. Structured Repayment — Enjoy flexible repayment terms, spread over time to ease the burden on your cash flow. (KFD §5: 'Loans are a financing option where AMWCL provides money to the customer while keeping a security with us (usually vehicle ownership). Then the customer makes fixed or structured payments over a period to pay off the amount given by AMWCL with interest.')
tenorText: The lease/loan period can be from 4 months to 6 years. (KFD §5)
tenor: Long-term (> 5 years), Medium-term (1-5 years), Short-term (< 1 year)
costText: Interest: 'Interest is decided at the start of the lease/loan period. However, the agreed interest rates can be changed if a major economic problem threatens its stability, as agreed with customers, in which case the customer will be kept informed.' Fees & Charges (KFD p.5–6): one-time documentation fee Rs.3,000–Rs.25,000 (depending on facility value); cheque-return fee Rs.2,500/- per return; visiting fee Rs.1,250/- (after 3 months overdue, once per month); termination fee Rs.1,250–Rs.2,500 (no termination fee in last six months); pre-mature settlement fee up to 30% of future capital; duplicate deletion letter Rs.3,000/-; applicable government taxes (e.g. stamp duty) added to facility amount; overdue interest 3% per month on overdue part; 'When installment amounts are paid, there is a sequence of how the charges are recovered, it usually goes as insurance, taxes (if any), overdue interest, any other charges, etc. and capital is deducted last.'
gracePeriod: Not disclosed (sources checked: product page, KFD)
minFunding: Not disclosed (sources checked: product page, Key Fact Document, downloads page)
maxFunding: Not disclosed (sources checked: product page, Key Fact Document, downloads page)
guarantee: None disclosed (pledged vehicle is the security)
eligibilityText: Customer must be between 20 to 70 years of age. Required documents and evidence listed in the next section must be brought. (KFD §5) Available for existing and new clients; refinancing options for existing assets.
eligibleApplicants: Individuals; Businesses; Existing AMWCL clients refinancing assets; New clients
businessSizeText: Not disclosed (sources checked: product page, KFD)
valueChainText: Not disclosed (sources checked: product page, KFD)
collateralText: Pledge Your Vehicle — Use your vehicle as collateral—no additional security required. (KFD: 'while keeping a security with us (usually vehicle ownership)')

capitalRequirement: Not disclosed (sources checked: product page, KFD)
greenCertRequirement: Not disclosed (sources checked: product page, KFD)
requiredDocs: Required documents and evidence (KFD §6) — Individuals: Original valid National Identity Card or Driving License for Sri Lankan citizens. Or passport for non-citizens. A recent (less than 3 months old) utility bill/s for either electricity, water or fixed line telephone bill in your name. Documents to prove source of funds […]. Any other documents depending on the situation. Registered companies: The Certificate of Incorporation, Articles of Association, Board Resolution, copy of form 01, form 13, form 20, and form 40 (where applicable), Ultimate Beneficiary Owner details. Latest audited financial statements or management accounts if available. Plus: Individual and Joint Lease Loan HP Application; Business Lease Loan HP Application; Guarantor Statement (per downloads page).

contactPerson: Marketing Executive at any AMWCL branch (KFD §7)

institutionType: Non-Banking Financial Institution (NBFI)  - (Inlcuding leasing companies and factoring companies)
useCaseText: Auto Loan is a special loan scheme offered by Commercial Credit and Finance PLC to its customers for the purpose of purchasing motor vehicles. Purchasing of Motor Car, Jeep and Motor Vans will be permitted under Auto Loan scheme.
description: Secured loan granted against the security of a vehicle. Manufacturing year of registered vehicles should be within 14 years up to disbursement; brand new/unregistered vehicles have no restriction. Facility amount calculated based on LTV ratios issued by CBSL and financial position of the customer. Facilities granted for period from 6 months to 6 years. Customer can settle the loan at any time; no objection letter for transfer of absolute ownership given once loan is settled.
tenorText: 6 months to 6 years
tenor: Long-term (> 5 years), Medium-term (1-5 years), Short-term (< 1 year)
costText: Interest: Annual effective rate 16%–25% (EN189). Service Charges: Rs. 5,000.00 – Rs. 7,000.00 (EN189) [KFD EN162 quotes Rs. 5,000–7,500 excluding motor bikes & three-wheelers; 1% of stamp fee excluding lorries, buses, mini trucks, tractors and three wheelers]. Document Charges: Rs. 2,500.00. Penalty Interest: 5% per month. Early Settlement Charge: decided by management.

institutionType: Non-Banking Financial Institution (NBFI)  - (Inlcuding leasing companies and factoring companies)
useCaseText: Are you a small business owner looking to expand your business? or are you an entrepreneur looking to start your own business and need financial assistance? The microfinance loan product of Commercial Credit designed to support small and medium women entrepreneurs in Sri Lanka provides tailor-made loan products after evaluating your business. […] We will further provide you with entrepreneurship training and support to develop your businesses.
description: The Micro finance loan is a short term collateral-free loan that is designed to provide financial support for business needs and consumption needs of lower income female customers. The micro finance marketing officer visits the Customer Service Unit (CSU) where groups of customers gather at predetermined frequencies to collect rentals. Helps to provide financial services to those in remote locations where traditional financial institutions do not serve. Includes Social Performance Management (SPM) — managing the progress of physical, mental and educational self-reliance.
tenorText: Not disclosed (sources checked: EN94 KFD and product page do not state a specific tenor — weekly rentals)
costText: Interest: Annual Flat rate 28% – 40% (EN189, Microfinance). Service Charge: 3.50% to 4.00% (1% for Consumer Loan -AL) (EN189). Document Charge: 1.00% or Rs. 50.00 (EN189). Penalty Interest: 5% per month (default interest, EN94). Funds granted must be utilized only for approved purposes.

description: Term Draft: revolving facility where facility limit and loan period are approved and disbursement can be done as per the customer's requirements up to the limit as sub loans. Interest will be charged for the disbursed amount only. The loan is granted against a mortgage of a property that legal ownership is vested with the customer. Facility can be renewed by settling the total outstanding or minimum 10% from the total outstanding at the end of the agreed period based on credit evaluation.
tenorText: 1 year (renewable)
costText: Interest: Annual effective rate 22% (EN189, Term Draft). Service Charges: Rs. 1,000.00 – Rs. 30,000.00 (EN189). Document Charges: Rs. 1,000 to Rs. 2,500 of Document Charge based on finance amount, Rs. 2,000 to Rs. 15,000 of service charge based on loan amount (EN97). Penalty Interest: 4% per month (EN97).

institutionType: Non-Banking Financial Institution (NBFI)  - (Inlcuding leasing companies and factoring companies)
useCaseText: Preferable for corporate clients. Customer can accommodate large number of debtors as working capital capacity is improved. Postdated cheques are accepted. Advance the cash inflow to the customer. Get better discounts from suppliers. Pay lenders on time. Pay other payments on time and avoid disputes. Improve sales. (KFD EN90 'Factoring'.)
description: This product offers facility to finance working capital requirements of businesses. Short term advances can be taken as factoring, invoice discounting, client cheque discounting. Customer gets the discounted amount from the invoice or cheque at the time of facility granting. Full payment made after deducting applicable interest and charges at the invoice settlement. Collections handled by CCFP or client as per the agreement.
tenorText: Not disclosed (sources checked: EN90 KFD does not state a specific tenor (short-term))
costText: Interest: Annual effective rate 26% (EN189, Factoring). Service Charges: Invoice / Cheque Value 0.5% (EN189) [0.5% of service charge based on utilized amount per EN90]. Document Charges: Rs. 5,000.00 (EN189). Penalty Interest: 10% per annum (EN90).
gracePeriod: Not disclosed (sources checked: KFDs and product pages do not mention a grace period)
minFunding: Not disclosed (sources checked: EN90 and EN189 do not specify a minimum amount)
maxFunding: Not disclosed (sources checked: EN90 and EN189 do not specify a maximum amount — based on invoice value (70%–90% advance against invoice value))

Individual limits given to debtors based on their credibility of the credit approval. Minimum of 2 guarantors required and one guarantor can be a partner/director or family member of the main customer.
eligibleApplicants: Sri Lankan citizens 18–65 with sole proprietorships, partnerships and Companies registered under Companies Act. 2 guarantors required.

institutionType: Non-Banking Financial Institution (NBFI)  - (Inlcuding leasing companies and factoring companies)
productName: Short Term Loan / Loan against Fixed Deposit
useCaseText: Attractive & Reasonable interest rates. Flexible repayment terms. The FD customers of the CCFP can obtain a loan facility against her/his fixed deposit maintained at the CCFP. (KFD EN163 'Loan against Fixed Deposits'.)
description: Short Term Loan facility granted against an existing Fixed Deposit maintained at CCFP. Loan repayments can be made on monthly basis or charged from the Term or Maturity interest, depending on the customer's preference. The loan will be automatically set off when either the loan exposure reaches 95% or when there is an outstanding balance at maturity of secured fixed deposits, whichever comes first. No penal interest rate is applicable; no service charge is applicable.
tenorText: Not disclosed (sources checked: EN163 KFD does not state a specific tenor — linked to FD tenor; auto-settled at 95% exposure or FD maturity)
costText: Interest: Collateral FD rate + (3%–5%) (EN189, Sort Term Loan/FD against loan ST). Interest rates decided by management; will vary from 3%–5% over the Fixed Deposit rate offered and according to the exposure of the loan (EN163). Service Charges: NA. Document Charges: NA. Penalty Interest: No penal interest rate is applicable.

minFunding: Not disclosed (sources checked: EN163 and EN189 do not state a minimum amount)
maxFunding: Up to 90% of value of the Fixed Deposit (EN91 cross-reference)

productName: Vehicle Leasing — CDB Hybrid Leasing (EV/Hybrid) / eShift
useCaseText: Embrace the future of driving with CDB Hybrid Leasing, where you can seamlessly drive away in your dream Hybrid, Plug-in Hybrid, or Electric Vehicle. Whether registered or unregistered, our tailored Leasing and Auto Loan facilities offer the perfect blend of flexibility and convenience, empowering you to enjoy the benefits of eco-friendly technology today.
description: Tailored leasing and auto-loan facilities for Hybrid, Plug-in Hybrid and Electric vehicles. useCaseText: The CDB Advance Roof Solar product, introduced under our Green Financing segment, is designed as a comprehensive solution for those seeking a sustainable and intelligent energy alternative. This product enables customers to transition to a smarter, self-sufficient lifestyle by adopting renewable energy.

No securities or deed mortgage.

useCaseText: A hire purchase contract (HP) is an installment plan, under which a customer agrees to a contract to acquire an asset by paying a down payment (deposit) and repaying the balance of the price of the asset together with interest over a period of the contract to the owner/lender. [Source: CF KFD §8]
description: Installment-based asset acquisition with down payment plus periodic instalments. LTV per CBSL directions and applicant creditworthiness; rentals due only after asset acceptance. Mandatory insurance via CF Insurance Brokers. [Source: CF KFD §8]
tenorText: Period: 12-72 Months
costText: Service Charges: Rs. 15,000 and above depending on contract value. Stamp Duty: 1% of total receivables. Valuation/CRIB charges. Late payment fees: 4% per mensum on outstanding. Pre-termination fee: one third of future interest. [Source: CF KFD §8]

institutionType: Non-Banking Financial Institution (NBFI)  - (Inlcuding leasing companies and factoring companies)
useCaseText: Long Term Vehicle Hire solutions for Companies. Solutions are available for one vehicle or a fleet of vehicles. [Source: CF KFD §14]
description: Operating lease (off-balance-sheet) for vehicles, available for one vehicle or a fleet, with optional on-the-road maintenance, insurance, and revenue license. Sale & Leaseback facility available for existing fleets. 24/7 standby service for breakdowns. [Source: CF KFD §14 + Fleet Hire page]
tenorText: Period of hire chosen by customer based on cash flow, economic mileage and company car policy
costText: Monthly rental varies by vehicle make/model, spare parts, maintenance and insurance costs. Stamp duty: 1% of agreement value at signing. Rentals subject to VAT and levies. Excess mileage rates: Motor car Rs.14–17 + SSCL+VAT/km, Van Rs.17 + SSCL+VAT/km, Double Cab/Jeep/Truck Rs.22 + SSCL+VAT/km. Late payment fees: 3% per mensem on outstanding. [Source: CF KFD §14]

collateralText: CF retains ownership of the vehicle throughout the contract; no separate collateral required. [Source: CF Fleet Hire page + KFD §14]

institutionType: Non-Banking Financial Institution (NBFI)  - (Inlcuding leasing companies and factoring companies)
useCaseText: On the Loan obtained against the Deposit, an additional 4% interest rate is levied over and above the applicable interest of the deposit. [Source: CF KFD §10]
description: Pre-approved loan against the customer's own Fixed Deposit; up to 90% of capital on maturity deposits and up to 70% on monthly-interest deposits. Available via branch counter or ATM (pre-approved card facility). [Source: CF KFD §10 + FAQ]
tenorText: Available until maturity of the underlying Fixed Deposit; loan balance may be carried forward subject to FD renewal
costText: Interest: 4% above the contracted rate of interest of the Deposit; calculated on daily outstanding balance. ATM card for pre-approved Loan against FD: Rs. 500. [Source: CF KFD §10 + FAQ]
gracePeriod: Not disclosed (sources checked: https://cf.lk/key-facts-documents/, https://cf.lk/key-facts-documents/)

institutionType: Non-Banking Financial Institution (NBFI)  - (Inlcuding leasing companies and factoring companies)

tenorText: Applicable for deposits made for periods between 12 months to 60 months irrespective of monthly or maturity
costText: Same monthly/maturity rates as CF Term and CF Senior Citizen FD (W.E.F. 01/04/2026): Term 12M 9.00%/10.00% to 60M 9.50%/11.75%; SC 12M 9.50%/10.50% to 60M 10.00%/12.25%. Discounted-rate applied when interest withdrawn in advance (rate set at withdrawal). AIT 5%. [Source: CF Interest Rates + Kalin Poli page]
gracePeriod: Not disclosed (sources checked: https://cf.lk/cf-kalin-poli/, https://cf.lk/key-facts-documents/)

maxFunding: No maximum

institutionType: Non-Banking Financial Institution (NBFI)  - (Inlcuding leasing companies and factoring companies)
useCaseText: Drive the vehicle of your dreams! […] Be it a brand-new car, reconditioned or pre-owned, we will ensure you drive away in the vehicle of your dreams with a hassle-free scheme. Our vehicle leasing facility also offers refinancing for your existing vehicle, so you could address any emergency requirements.
description: Personalised leasing solutions with attractive interest rates, flexible re-payment terms, and no hidden charges. Cars, Vans, SUVs and Pickup Vehicles manufactured after the year 2000. Maximum lease period: up to 5 years. Also offers refinancing for your existing vehicle.
tenorText: 13 months to 60 months (KFD page 21)
costText: Documentation/Processing Fee: Rs.10,000 (>1Mn) or Rs.5,000 (<1Mn) (Schedule of Charges page 17); Early Settlement: 60% Interest Rebate (Standard), 100% (subject to new facility), 90% (Refinance); Penalty Interest 3% p.a.; RMV Processing Fee Rs.1,000; Re-issue Duplicate Deletion Rs.1,500; Re-issue Transfer Papers Rs.3,000; Sale of Asset at Settlement Rs.5,000; Invoice Processing Fee Rs.1,000; Balance Confirmation Rs.1,000; Facility Amendments Rs.10,000 (>1Mn) / Rs.5,000 (<1Mn); CRIB Clearance Rs.1,000; Yard Admin Rs.4,000; Parking fee Rs.2,000/mo (motor bikes), Rs.5,000/mo (Cars, Vans & SUVs), Rs.7,000/mo (All other assets); Stamp Duty up front; Assets Replacement Fee Rs.5,000; Retrieval of Archived Documents Rs.500; Letter confirming settlement Rs.1,000; No arrears letter Rs.500; Payment history Rs.500; Insurance Commission per Insureme agreement; PD Cheque Returns / Debtor Cheque Return Rs.1,000.
gracePeriod: Not disclosed (sources checked: product page, KFD)
minFunding: Not disclosed (Schedule of Charges separates ≤1mn vs >1mn for fee tiers)
guarantee: Vehicle as security; insurance routed through Insureme (Group)
eligibilityText: Age 20 – 55 years of age; Sri Lankan Citizens; Professionals/Businessmen/Individuals and corporates; Regular CRIB record
eligibleApplicants: Sri Lankan citizens 20-55 yrs; Professionals/Businessmen/Individuals/Corporates with regular CRIB
collateralText: Vehicle (Car/Van/SUV/Pickup, manufactured after 2000); insurance under Fleet Policy / Insureme
requiredDocs: NIC; Billing proof (If required); A/C opening mandate OR digital account opening process; Business Registration Certificate (Corporates, Partnership or sole proprietorship)
contactPerson: Customer Support / Service Request via Genie App; 011 4 317 317 (Colombo)
smeApplicabilityText: OPEN: "Professionals/Businessmen/Individuals and cooperates" — T&C SME owners eligible for vehicle leasing including for business-use vehicles

institutionType: Non-Banking Financial Institution (NBFI)  - (Inlcuding leasing companies and factoring companies)
useCaseText: From fulfilling your working capital requirement by refinancing your existing vehicles to support acquiring other types of fixed assets, Dialog Finance has got your business covered.
description: Fast and flexible corporate leasing options. Customized & Conventional. Minimal documentation. Quick and easy processing. By choosing a Dialog Finance Corporate Leasing option, your company becomes eligible for a host of benefits that range from a flexible repayment period to a personalised service.
tenorText: Flexible repayment period (not specified); leasing tenor up to 60 months per Schedule of Charges
costText: Documentation/Processing Fee: Rs.10,000 (>1Mn) / Rs.5,000 (<1Mn); Early Settlement: 60% Interest Rebate (Standard), 100% (new facility), 90% (Refinance); Penalty Interest 3% p.a.; full Leasing fee schedule applies (same as retail leasing — Schedule of Charges pages 17-18).
guarantee: Vehicle / asset as security; insurance under Fleet Policy
eligibilityText: Corporate entities; To qualify for a corporate leasing solution, you will need to present documents that verify your company's finances and legality.
collateralText: Leased vehicle / fixed asset; documents verifying company finances and legality
requiredDocs: Documents that verify your company's finances and legality. KFD-cited (Leasing — Corporate variant): NIC; Billing proof (If required); A/C opening mandate OR digital account opening process; Business Registration Certificate (Corporates, Partnership or sole proprietorship).
smeApplicabilityText: OPEN: "acquire vehicles to get your business moving" / "corporate leasing solution" — T&C SMEs eligible for both vehicle and fixed-asset leasing

institutionType: Non-Banking Financial Institution (NBFI)  - (Inlcuding leasing companies and factoring companies)
useCaseText: Get a loan against your Fixed Deposit quickly and simply. Continue earning interest on the Fixed Deposit even after obtaining the loan. […] Applying for a loan with just a few taps on your device.
description: Loan against Fixed Deposit. Borrow up to 90% of the Fixed Deposit value (T&C apply). For loans with monthly interest payment frequency, up to 80% of the FD value is allowed. Loan tenure: Minimum 3 months, maximum 60 months. Multiple loans: You can obtain multiple loans against one FD. Effortless application process completed in minutes. Prepayment option: You can prepay the loan before FD matures without any additional charges. Loan instalment deduction: automatic deduction from savings account on due date.
tenorText: Minimum 3 months, maximum 60 months
costText: Interest Rate (Digital): FD rate + 2.0% p.a.; Interest Rate (Manual): FD rate + 2.0% p.a. (Schedule of Charges page 14). Documentation Fees: 0.5% of the loan amount (Minimum: Rs.500/-, Maximum: Rs.3,000/-). General loan charges apply (Loan Settlement Rs.500; CRIB Clearance Rs.500; Bank Statement Rs.1,000; OTC Fund Transfer Rs.100; Penalty Interest 3% p.a.).
minFunding: Minimum FD value required: Rs. 10,000/-
maxFunding: Up to 90% of the Fixed Deposit value (80% if monthly interest payment)
guarantee: Fixed Deposit pledged as security; FD must not be secured for any other loan types
eligibilityText: Customer need to have a savings account attached to the genie app. Customer need to have a fixed deposit account with Dialog Finance PLC. Customer need to have a fixed deposit worth of Rs, 25,000/- to apply for a Loan against FD. Fixed deposit should not be collateral for any other loans. If the fixed deposit is placed under a "closure at maturity" renewable instruction, then the remaining period should be within 3 months from the maturity date.
eligibleApplicants: Existing Dialog Finance FD holders (≥ Rs.25,000 FD)
businessSizeText: Not specified (any Dialog Finance FD holder)
collateralText: Fixed Deposit lien (FD must not be secured for any other loan)
capitalRequirement: Existing FD ≥ Rs.25,000 (Rs.10,000 per Web; Rs.25,000 per KFD)
requiredDocs: Digital account opening process; existing FD account holder (KFD page 18)
processingTime: Effortless and completed in minutes
contactPerson: Customer Support / Service Request via Genie App
smeApplicabilityText: OPEN: "Customer need to have a fixed deposit account with Dialog Finance PLC" — T&C SMEs (and their owners) holding a Dialog Finance FD can obtain a Loan against FD for working capital

institutionType: Non-Banking Financial Institution (NBFI)  - (Inlcuding leasing companies and factoring companies)
useCaseText: Term Loan for SME Clients / Corporates / Individuals. Attractive Interest rates. Quick processing of loans. Dialog Finance Savings Account. Ability assign debtor payments to settle loan instalments.
description: Marketed via the "Working Capital Loans for SMEs" landing page as: "Finance your entrepreneurial goals with the best SME loans on offer with Dialog Finance. Cash-in-hand is essential to cover budding expenses and our capital loans will ensure you will never be found wanting […] no-cost, no-obligation application that comes with funding in just 24 hours." KFD page 23 names this product as "Term Loan".
tenorText: EMI Based 12 months or more (per Schedule of Charges page 19)
costText: SMEs/Corporates: Documentation/Processing Fee: EMI 12 months or more — 0.15% Standard (Min Rs. 5,000, Max Rs. 200,000); Early Settlement Fees Max 4% / Min 2% (Refer waivers); PD Cheque Returns/Debtor Cheque Return fee Rs. 1,000; Penalty Interest rate 3% per annum. Individual/Small Business (smaller-ticket variant): 0.15% Standard (Min Rs.500, Max Rs.15,000); Early Settlement Max 4% / Min 2%; PD Cheque Rs.1,000; Penalty 3% p.a. (Schedule of Charges page 19). General loan charges also apply (Loan Settlement Rs.500; CRIB Clearance Rs.500; Bank Statement Rs.1,000; Mortgage bond releases/Cancellation LKR 10,000).
gracePeriod: Not disclosed (sources checked: product page, KFD, T&C)
guarantee: Immovable Property / Personal Guarantee / Movable property / Equipment
eligibilityText: SME Clients / Corporates / Individuals (KFD page 23)
collateralText: Immovable Property, Personal Guarantee, Movable property / Equipment
requiredDocs: NIC / BR registration certificate; A/C opening mandate OR digital account opening process; Bank statements / Income proof (KFD page 23)
processingTime: Funding in just 24 hours (per Working Capital Loans landing page)
smeApplicabilityText: OPEN: "SME Clients / Corporates / Individuals" — T&C SMEs explicitly eligible for term-loan working-capital and CAPEX funding

institutionType: Non-Banking Financial Institution (NBFI)  - (Inlcuding leasing companies and factoring companies)
useCaseText: Business Revolving Loan for SME Clients / Corporates / Individuals. Attractive Interest rates. Quick processing of factoring facility. (KFD page 25)
description: Marketed via the "Working Capital Loans for SMEs" landing page as the short-term revolving variant. KFD page 25 names this product as "Business Revolving Loan". Designed as short-term / revolving facility to scale up your business — "Looking for ways to scale up your business? Here's the opportunity that you have been searching for all along!"
tenorText: Short Term tenor less than 12 months or revolving (Schedule of Charges page 19)
costText: SMEs/Corporates: Documentation/Processing Fee: Short-term/revolving — 0.10% Standard (Min Rs. 5,000, Max Rs. 200,000); Early Settlement Fees Max 4% / Min 2% (Refer waivers); PD Cheque Returns/Debtor Cheque Return Rs. 1,000; Penalty Interest 3% per annum (Schedule of Charges page 19). Individual/Small Business variant: 0.10% Standard (Min Rs.500, Max Rs.15,000). General loan charges also apply.
gracePeriod: Not disclosed (sources checked: product page, KFD, T&C)
guarantee: Personal Guarantee, Immovable Property
eligibilityText: SME Clients / Corporates / Individuals (KFD page 25)
collateralText: Personal Guarantee, Immovable Property
requiredDocs: NIC / BR registration certificate; A/C opening mandate OR digital account opening process; Bank statements / Income proof (KFD page 25)
processingTime: Funding in just 24 hours (per Working Capital Loans landing page)
smeApplicabilityText: OPEN: "SME Clients / Corporates / Individuals" — T&C SMEs explicitly eligible for revolving short-term working-capital funding

institutionType: Non-Banking Financial Institution (NBFI)  - (Inlcuding leasing companies and factoring companies)
productName: Factoring & PO Financing — Invoice / Receivables Factoring
useCaseText: You Run the Business, We Manage the Receivables. Release any cash you have tied up on outstanding credit invoices and Dialog Purchase Orders with Dialog Finance factoring services. Remove the hassle of worrying when you will receive payments.
description: Receive your payments early. Once we establish the validity of your debtor's invoice, we will make pre-payments based on its value. When the debtor makes a full payment, the factoring fee is deducted and the balance paid back to you. We consider each case on individual merit and offer factoring services tailor-made for you with flexible interest rates. KFD page 24 names this as "Factoring" under "Invoice Order Financing".
tenorText: Short Term tenor less than 12 months (PO/Invoice Financing — Schedule of Charges page 20)
costText: PO/Invoice Financing (Schedule of Charges page 20): Documentation/Processing Fee 0.15% Standard (Min Rs. 22,500, Max Rs. 200,000); Early Settlement Fees Max 4% (Min Refer waivers); Administration fee 0.5% on every PO or invoice; Minimum monthly service fee 0.05% on the facility value (charged only if administration charge is not applicable or is lower than monthly service charge in any given month); PD Cheque Returns/Debtor Cheque Return fee Rs. 1,000; Penalty Interest rate 3% per annum.
minFunding: Not disclosed (advance is based on debtor invoice value)
guarantee: Personal Guarantee; assignment of debtor invoices
eligibilityText: SME Clients / Corporates (KFD page 24); At the outset, Dialog Finance will determine if your business qualifies for factoring services.
collateralText: Personal Guarantee
requiredDocs: NIC / BR registration certificate; A/C opening mandate OR digital account opening process; Bank statements / Income proof (KFD page 24)
smeApplicabilityText: OPEN: "SME Clients / Corporates" — T&C SMEs with credit-invoice receivables (e.g., from apparel buyers) eligible for factoring to unlock working capital

institutionType: Non-Banking Financial Institution (NBFI)  - (Inlcuding leasing companies and factoring companies)
productName: Factoring & PO Financing — Purchase Order Financing
useCaseText: Release any cash you have tied up on outstanding credit invoices and Dialog Purchase Orders with Dialog Finance factoring services. […] Get a lease with Dialog Finance to ensure the continuous operation of your firm.
description: Purchase Order financing as part of the Factoring & PO Financing umbrella. Once we establish the validity of your purchase order, we will make pre-payments based on its value. Used to fund pre-shipment supply orders so the supplier can fulfil the order before final invoice/payment. Schedule of Charges combines PO and Invoice Factoring under "PO/Invoice Financing".
tenorText: Short Term tenor less than 12 months (PO/Invoice Financing — Schedule of Charges page 20)

minFunding: Not disclosed (advance based on PO value)
guarantee: Personal Guarantee; assignment of debtor invoices / purchase orders

institutionType: Non-Banking Financial Institution (NBFI)  - (Inlcuding leasing companies and factoring companies)
productName: Cyclone & Floods Relief — Concessionary Recovery Loans & Debt Relief (CBSL Circular 01 of 2026)
useCaseText: Dialog Finance PLC extends our heartfelt concern to everyone affected by the recent cyclonic conditions and flooding across Sri Lanka. […] In line with the Central Bank of Sri Lanka Circular No. 01 of 2026, we are offering special relief measures to customers whose income or businesses have been impacted by these disasters.
description: Ways We Can Support Your Recovery: 1. Temporary Debt Relief — Customers may apply for a temporary suspension of their loan repayments (capital and/or interest) for 3 to 6 months based on individual assessment. No additional interest will be charged on deferred interest during this period. 2. Concessionary Recovery Loans — Eligible customers may obtain new loan facilities to help rebuild and recover. These include: a minimum 3-month grace period; Concessionary interest rates as per CBSL guidelines; Flexible repayment options. 3. Waiver of Selected Fees & Charges — During the relief period, certain fees and penal charges related to affected credit facilities may be suspended or waived, in accordance with the Circular. 4. Transparency & Consent — written or electronic consent before applying any repayment suspension.
tenorText: Repayment suspension 3–6 months; new concessionary recovery loans with a minimum 3-month grace period and flexible repayment options
costText: Concessionary interest rates as per CBSL guidelines (CBSL Circular No. 01 of 2026); selected fees and penal charges may be suspended or waived in accordance with the Circular. No additional interest will be charged on deferred interest during the suspension period.
gracePeriod: Minimum 3-month grace period on new concessionary recovery loans
minFunding: Not disclosed (case-by-case individual assessment)
maxFunding: Not disclosed (case-by-case individual assessment)
guarantee: Subject to CBSL Circular No. 01 of 2026; standard credit assessment by Dialog Finance
eligibilityText: Customers whose income or businesses have been impacted by the recent cyclonic conditions and flooding across Sri Lanka; each request will be reviewed individually so we can provide the most suitable support for your situation. Application deadline: on or before 15th February 2026 (initial window).
eligibleApplicants: Existing Dialog Finance individual / business customers affected by the cyclone & floods
valueChainText: Not disclosed (sector-agnostic disaster relief)
collateralText: Not disclosed (applies to existing credit facilities and new recovery loans — standard collateral norms expected to apply)
requiredDocs: Written or electronic consent before applying any repayment suspension or relief measure to your account. Specific documents: "Each request will be reviewed individually so we can provide the most suitable support for your situation."
applicationForm: Contact via +94 760 760 760 or via Genie Service Request > Other on or before 15th February 2026
processingTime: Individual review per request
smeApplicabilityText: OPEN: "customers whose income or businesses have been impacted by these disasters" — T&C SMEs directly affected by the cyclone & floods are explicitly eligible for both debt-relief and concessionary recovery loans

useCaseText: OD Plus [is] a hybrid financing facility designed to provide short-term funding to customers using vehicles as security [...] enabling customers to access working capital while retaining use of their vehicle.
description: Janashakthi Finance PLC offers OD Plus, a hybrid financing facility designed to provide short-term funding to customers using vehicles as security. The facility combines a low exposure lease component with an overdraft-type loan facility, enabling customers to access working capital while retaining use of their vehicle. The loan facility operates as a limit which may be drawn down and settled within the approved tenor; the lease component includes a final capital repayment at the end of the facility tenor.

useCaseText: Micro Loans for middle and low income earning female entrepreneurs in Sri Lanka with little or no access to alternative methods of financing to start up or expand their small-scale businesses.
description: MFR microfinance loan for middle/low-income female entrepreneurs to start up or expand small-scale businesses. Applicant must have business income from agriculture or self-employed business and be a member of a Microfinance centre. Provided without collateral; group customers are cross-guarantors (group of 3–5 members).
tenorText: The standard loan repayment period is fifty weeks (50 weeks).
costText: Overdue interest charge is 3% p.m. (changeable at management discretion). Weekly rental payments. Relevant government taxes (if applicable), application accommodation fee & insurance premium specified initially.
gracePeriod: Not disclosed (sources checked: Credit KFD)
minFunding: 1st step – LKR 75,000 (initial loan step)
maxFunding: 4th step – LKR 150,000 (Maximum Loan amount). Steps: 1st 75,000 / 2nd 100,000 / 3rd 125,000 / 4th 150,000.
guarantee: Group customers are cross-guarantors (min 3, max 5 members); a third-party guarantor (spouse/guardian) is compulsory for each loan. Provided without collateral.
eligibilityText: Available for women who are self-employed / running their business and willing to start a business; not available for women employed under another entity/business. Must be a member of a Microfinance centre; business income from agriculture or self-employment; group members must not be related (at least 3 of 5 unrelated).
eligibleApplicants: Middle and low income earning female entrepreneurs (self-employed / small-scale business owners)
businessSizeText: Micro Loans will be provided for middle and low income earning female entrepreneurs in Sri Lanka with little or no access to alternative methods of financing to start up or expand their small-scale businesses.

Monthly interest of the remaining capital outstanding is paid as the minimum payment; interest calculated on daily basis; remaining capital outstanding collected at end of facility period; borrower can pay the capital amount from time to time.

useCaseText: Leasing product offers a range of features to customers who intend to purchase motor vehicles, three wheelers, bikes, commercial and land vehicles (selectively) etc.
description: We offer a wide range of leasing solutions to customers, whether you're a professional, businessman, self-employed or corporate entity. […] This product offers an affordable monthly rental with a minimum period of one year where monthly rental and the period can be customized as per the customers' requirement. […] Flexible lease and loan solutions for registered and unregistered vehicles; a choice of facility period up to 7 years.
tenorText: minimum period of one year […] a choice of facility period up to 7 years
costText: A fixed interest rate is charged during the tenure of the leasing product based on the credit risk of the client. Penal rate of 3% per month applicable only after seven days of grace period. Lease processing Fee: Processing Fee: up to Rs.100,000 = 4% of amount; Rs.100,000–500,000 = 3.50% of amount; Rs.500,001–1,000,000 = Rs.15,000; above Rs.1,000,000 = Rs.20,000. Transfer fee on settlement Rs.4,000 (4-wheel)/Rs.1,500 (3-wheel)/2-wheel; Duplicate deletion letter Rs.500 (2/3-wheeler), Rs.1,000 (4-wheeler); Due date change Rs.3,000; Confirmation letters Rs.2,000; Recovery visits Rs.500/visit; Introducer commission 1%–3%; Postage Rs.75 normal/Rs.150 registered; Cheque return Rs.1,000.
gracePeriod: Seven days grace period (before 3% per month penal rate applies)

institutionType: Non-Banking Financial Institution (NBFI)  - (Inlcuding leasing companies and factoring companies)
productName: Islamic Finance (Al-Jabal AFU) — Ijarah Vehicle Financing
useCaseText: The Ijarah scheme is unique, being specially designed and tailor-made to address all your vehicle leasing needs. […] (Al Jabal) will buy the vehicle you need and rent it to you […] At the end of the agreed rental period, we will gift the vehicle back to you […]
description: Ijarah is a Shariah-compliant mode of vehicle financing: AMF (Al Jabal) buys the vehicle and rents it to the customer for full usage; at the end of the rental period ownership is gifted to the customer. Offered for brand-new and registered vehicles. Rentals due only upon commencement of usage and only if the asset is in working condition; leased asset comprehensively insured under a Takaful policy for the full term.
tenorText: Not disclosed (sources checked: product page, AMF Key Fact Document 2024, downloads section)
costText: Profit rate based on the secondhand market of the vehicle, condition of the vehicle and customer risk profile; Monthly Rental specified before contract; Charity Fund & Administrative charge 5% per month on arrears; comprehensive Takaful insurance for full term. Service charges (by facility amount): Up to 1Mn ~Rs.7,000; 1Mn–1.6Mn Rs.10,000; 1.6Mn–3Mn Rs.x,500; 3Mn–5Mn Rs.x,000; >5Mn Rs.x,500; Three Wheels Rs.3,000; Two Wheelers Rs.4,500; CRIB Rs.500/CRIB; statutory charges.
gracePeriod: Rentals will be due only upon commencement of usage of the asset
minFunding: Not disclosed (sources checked: product page, AMF Key Fact Document 2024, downloads section)
maxFunding: The maximum lease cost is restricted as per the LTV guidelines of CBSL
guarantee: Leased asset comprehensively insured under a Takaful policy for the full term; vehicle owned by AMF until transfer
eligibilityText: Ijarah vehicle financing for brand-new and registered vehicles, structured per Islamic Shariah principles with a Shariah Supervisory Board.
eligibleApplicants: Individuals and companies seeking Shariah-compliant vehicle finance
businessSizeText: Available for Individuals and companies (per KFD Ijarah section)
collateralText: Asset (vehicle) owned by AMF and leased to customer; comprehensive Takaful insurance
turnoverRequirement: Not disclosed (sources checked: product page, AMF Key Fact Document 2024, downloads section)
capitalRequirement: Not disclosed (sources checked: product page, AMF Key Fact Document 2024, downloads section)
